support.line.serverCost: Server costs are covered by Austin and 100% voluntary donations.
support.line.openChat: Please use OpenKakaoTalk only for gifticon donations.
apiKey.title: Enter Gemini API Key
apiKey.desc.line1: Chatting with ARONA requires a Google Gemini API key.
apiKey.desc.line2: The key is not stored on the server and is kept for 10 minutes (auto-extended while chatting).
apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.invalid: That doesn't look like a valid Gemini API key.
apiKey.studio: Get a free API key from Google AI Studio
apiKey.notice.title: Heads up
apiKey.notice.beta: ARONA is in beta and may not work correctly.
apiKey.notice.feedback: Your questions and the answers may be used to improve the feature.
apiKey.search.title: 🔍 About search
apiKey.search.line1: Free API keys have limited search, so some answers may be inaccurate.
apiKey.search.line2: Adding a billing method to your project enables search but charges your card per use.

totalAnalysis.starDist.title: Star Distribution
guide.title: Total Assault / Grand Assault Beginner Guide
guide.subtitle: New to Total Assault or Grand Assault? Use this guide to get started.
guide.step1.title: Step 1: Get Ready
guide.step1.level.title: Level & Gear
guide.step1.level.desc: Raise your level and unlock the regions first. Level and gear matter a lot.
guide.step1.assist.title: Recommended Assists
guide.step1.assist.desc: Borrow a strong DPS assist from a friend. Pick a different type if the boss demands it.
guide.step1.gimmick.title: Gimmick & Buffer Students
guide.step1.gimmick.desc: Raise students who can clear gimmicks or provide buffs.
guide.step2.title: Step 2: Try EXTREME / INSANE
guide.step2.intro: Once you're ready, try EXTREME / INSANE. Aim to clear it repeatedly to farm coins and rewards.
guide.step2.ref: Reference videos below assume new-player progress around the JP 5th anniversary.
guide.step3.title: Step 3: Higher Difficulties
guide.step3.intro: Once INSANE is cleared, try TORMENT / LUNATIC.
guide.step3.line.external: For more info, check YouTube or other community sites.
guide.step3.line.torment: TORMENT usually clears in 1-2 parties with the right core students.
guide.note.hieronymus.1: A single healer and defense-down work well.
guide.note.goz.1: Use the giveaway 3-stars Unsmi and Suzuko.
guide.note.perorodzilla.1: Borrow a strong AOE damage dealer.
guide.note.perorodzilla.2: Students need to survive Perorodzilla's hits.
guide.note.kaiten.1: Difficulty is low, INSANE is approachable.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1.title: 1. Overview
privacy.s1.body: BA Torment (hereafter "the Service") is an unofficial fan site for Blue Archive. This Privacy Policy explains what information the Service collects and how it is handled.
privacy.s2.title: 2. Information We Collect
privacy.s2.auto.title: 2.1 Automatically Collected
privacy.s2.auto.1: Visit history and usage patterns (Google Analytics)
privacy.s2.user.title: 2.2 Provided by the User
privacy.s2.user.1: Gemini API key entered for the A.R.O.N.A feature (stored in session storage temporarily, auto-deleted after 30 minutes)
privacy.s3.title: 3. How We Use the Information
privacy.s4.title: 4. Third-Party Services
privacy.s4.intro: The Service uses the following third-party services:
privacy.s4.noads: The Service does not display any ads.
privacy.s4.refer: For details on each service's data handling, please refer to its respective privacy policy.
privacy.s5.title: 5. Cookies
privacy.s5.body: The Service uses cookies to improve user experience and analyze usage. You can refuse cookies in your browser settings, but some features may be limited.
privacy.s6.title: 6. Data Retention & Deletion
privacy.s6.1: Gemini API key: stored in session storage temporarily, auto-deleted after 30 minutes
privacy.s6.2: Analytics data: follows the Google Analytics retention policy
privacy.s7.title: 7. Contact
privacy.s7.body: For privacy inquiries, contact the email below:
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1.title: 1. About the Service
terms.s1.body1.after: for Blue Archive. The Service has no official affiliation with NEXON GAMES or YOSTAR.
terms.s1.body2: The Service provides Raid party search, video analysis, score calculator, AI search, and related features.
terms.s2.title: 2. Copyright & Intellectual Property
terms.s2.body1.before: All Blue Archive characters, images, logos, and related content are copyright
terms.s2.body2: Analysis tools, formulas, UI, and other content originally produced by the Service belong to the Service operator.
terms.s3.title: 3. Disclaimer
terms.s3.1: The Service does not guarantee the accuracy of any information it provides (party compositions, score calculations, etc.).
terms.s3.2: Game data is collected and analyzed by the community and may differ from the live game.
terms.s3.3: The Service is not liable for damages caused by use of the Service.
terms.s3.4: The Service may be changed or discontinued without prior notice.
terms.s4.title: 4. Usage Rules
terms.s4.1: Unauthorized crawling or automated access to the Service
terms.s4.2: Interfering with the normal operation of the Service
terms.s5.title: 5. Advertising
terms.s5.body: The Service currently does not display any ads.
terms.s6.title: 6. Changes to the Terms
terms.s6.body: These Terms may be updated as needed. Updates will be announced within the Service. If you do not agree to the updated Terms, you must stop using the Service.
terms.s7.title: 7. Contact
terms.s7.body: For Service-related inquiries, contact the email below:
